title: Press Enter In Key Presses
goal: Focus the key input area, press Enter, and stop when the result text updates.
instruction: Press Enter on the key presses page and stop when the page reports the pressed key.
review_notes: Exercises explicit focus and keyboard interaction before stopping on the updated result text.

steps.explanation: I focused the key input area so the page will receive the next keyboard action.
I pressed Enter. The result message should now report which key was received.

action.summary: I pressed Enter on the key presses page and stopped when the result updated.

steps.explanation: The page has reported the key press, so I am ending the task.
